subcodes.first_line: O ye two servants of God, and O ye handmaidens of the Divine Threshold! Such is 'Abdu'l-Bahá's longing for each of the loved ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده الهی وای اماء آستان ربانی عبدالبهاء را چنان آرزو که بهریک از احبای
subcodes.subjects: @personal instructions, @praise and encouragement, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @sacrifice of self; mystery of sacrifice
